cookieConsent.title: We respect your privacy
cookieConsent.body: We use essential cookies for the site to work, and with your consent, others to analyse usage and improve the product.
cookieConsent.catEssentialBody: Needed for login, session and basic preferences. The site does not work without these.
cookieConsent.catFunctionalBody: Remember UI preferences across sessions (e.g. your preferred view mode).
cookieConsent.catAnalyticsBody: Help us understand how the product is used, in aggregate and anonymously.
cookieConsent.catPerformanceBody: Capture technical errors so we can fix them faster. No personal identification.

passwordPolicy.tooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
passwordPolicy.needsLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
passwordPolicy.needsDigit: Password must contain at least one number.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.publishDescription: Publish a monthly schedule in 15 minutes.
schedule.fullDescription: Publish a monthly schedule in 15 minutes.

dashboard.sem_turnos_proximos_7: No shifts in the next 7 days.

settings.name: Name
settings.municipalHolidayHint: Date of your municipality's holiday (e.g., Santo António in Lisbon on June 13)

hero.heading: Work schedules in minutes, not hours
hero.description: Simplify shift management in your pharmacy, clinic, restaurant or hotel. Automatic, fair and legally compliant schedules.
hero.socialProof: The scheduling platform for healthcare teams

appPreview.heading: From chaos to control
appPreview.description: Stop wasting 4 hours a week creating schedules manually. Shiftera creates automatic schedules respecting your team's preferences, skills and legal compliance.
appPreview.bullet2: Synced with your team's mobile phone

features.heading: Everything you need to manage schedules
features.description: Features designed for pharmacies, clinics, restaurants and hotels in Portugal.
features.automaticSchedulesDesc: Create weekly schedules with reusable templates. Adjust shifts with drag-and-drop.
features.teamManagementDesc: Employee profiles, roles, availability and swap requests — all in one place.
features.swapsTimeOffDesc: Employees request swaps and time off directly in the app. You approve with one click.
features.fairnessAnalyticsDesc: Fair distribution of shifts, weekends and holidays. Visual dashboards to track.
features.complianceDesc: Automatic validations for Portuguese labor law: rest periods, hour limits, holidays.
features.exportDesc: Export schedules as PDF to post or as Excel for records. Reports ready for inspection.

howItWorks.heading: 3 simple steps to get started
howItWorks.step1Desc: Import employees, set skills, shifts and preferences. Takes 10 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Define coverage needs, mandatory shifts and legal restrictions. Once and you're done.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Click a button. Shiftera creates automatic schedules. Approve and share with your team.

testimonials.heading: What our customers say
testimonials.t1Quote: Shiftera reduced the time we spent creating schedules from 4 hours to 20 minutes. The whole team is grateful.
testimonials.t2Quote: Finally I can see all doctors' availability in one place. Shift swaps are no longer a nightmare.
testimonials.t3Quote: With the high turnover we have in food service, Shiftera is essential. I set up shifts in minutes and the team gets everything on their phone.
testimonials.t4Quote: Managing schedules for reception, housekeeping and F&B in a hotel is complex. Shiftera simplified everything with a single view.

pricing.heading: Simple and transparent
pricing.description: One plan. No surprises. Pay only for what you use.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes! The trial lasts 14 days and needs no credit card. Cancel anytime.
faq.q2: Does it work for pharmacies and clinics?
faq.a2: Yes, Shiftera was designed specifically for pharmacies, clinics, labs and practices in Portugal.
faq.q3: Is it compliant with labor law?
faq.a3: Yes. We automatically validate rest periods, weekly hour limits and mandatory holidays.
faq.a4: Yes, export as PDF to post in-store or Excel for records and reports.
faq.a5: $19 base + (5 × $2) = $29/month. The 14-day trial is completely free.

finalCta.heading: Ready to simplify your schedules?
finalCta.description: Join 500+ companies already saving time and creating fairer schedules.

footer.tagline: Shift scheduling software for Portuguese teams.

chatWidget.welcomeMessage: Hi there! How can I help you with Shiftera?
chatWidget.helpMore: Can I help you with anything else?
chatWidget.errorNoAnswer: Sorry, I couldn't find an answer. Would you like to contact support?
chatWidget.thankYou: Thank you! Our team will get back to you shortly.

farmacias.heroHeading: Pharmacy schedules that comply with labor law
farmacias.heroSubheading: Manage shifts, time off, swaps and pharmacy hours in one place. Built for Portugal — with municipal holidays and labor regulations included.
farmacias.painsSubheading: Common challenges in pharmacy team management.
farmacias.pain1Body: Different versions in each email, lost changes, nobody knows the official schedule.
farmacias.pain2Body: Rest between shifts, weekly maximums, mandatory days off—easy to violate and risk labour inspection fines.
farmacias.pain3Body: Group messages, forgotten agreements, conflicts. No record of who accepted what.
farmacias.useCasesSubheading: How Portuguese pharmacies use Shiftera daily.
farmacias.useCase1Body: Ensures minimum pharmacists at the counter during operating hours.
farmacias.useCase2Body: Stop wasting hours managing swap messages. Centralized system with full traceability.
farmacias.useCase3Body: Create next month's schedule with one click. Algorithm respects contracts, skills and law.
farmacias.useCase4Body: Export everything as PDF or Excel to present to labor inspection if needed.
farmacias.feature1Body: Algorithm creates monthly schedule with 1 click respecting contracts, constraints and rules.
farmacias.feature2Body: Employees request swaps, manager approves. No emails, no misunderstandings.
farmacias.feature3Body: Automatic validation: rest between shifts, weekly limits, mandatory holidays.
farmacias.feature4Body: Equity score: see who works too much or too little. Distribute fairly.
farmacias.feature5Body: Everyone sees the schedule on their phone. No printed posters, no confusion.
farmacias.feature6Body: Export as PDF to post or Excel for archive and legal compliance.
farmacias.testimonialQuote: It was chaos in Excel. Now the team sees the schedule on their phone and I stop getting 30 messages a week about swaps.
farmacias.faq1Question: Does Shiftera work for a 4-person pharmacy?
farmacias.faq1Answer: Yes, built for small teams. Price is €19/month + €2 per user above 3.
farmacias.faq2Question: Can I import an existing schedule?
farmacias.faq2Answer: Yes. Send us an Excel or start fresh. Our support guides the whole migration.
farmacias.faq3Question: What if I need custom rules for my pharmacy?
farmacias.faq3Answer: Most adjustments you can make yourself. For complex cases (special split shifts, unique rules), we have dedicated support.
farmacias.faq4Question: Does the system validate municipal holidays automatically?
farmacias.faq4Answer: Yes. Set your municipality and the system respects local holidays (Santo António in Lisbon, etc) automatically.
farmacias.faq5Question: Can I export schedules to email colleagues?
farmacias.faq5Answer: Yes. Export as PDF to print/post or Excel. Colleagues also get app notifications.
farmacias.finalCtaSubheading: 14 days free. No credit card. Setup in under 30 minutes.

clinicas.heroHeading: Clinical schedules respecting doctor rest and 24/7 nursing
clinicas.heroSubheading: Manage doctor rotations, nursing shifts, emergencies and availability in one place. With automatic rest validation and legal compliance.
clinicas.painsSubheading: Specific issues in clinics and health units.
clinicas.pain1Body: Cardiology, general nursing, emergencies—each with own rules. No single place to see everything.
clinicas.pain2Body: Night duty, then day shift next day? Law mandates minimum rest periods. Easy to violate without automation.
clinicas.pain3Body: Rotating shifts, 24/7 coverage, doctor vacations. Managing in Excel is chaotic and legally risky.
clinicas.useCasesSubheading: How clinics use Shiftera in production.
clinicas.useCase1Body: Schedules respecting rest between night and day shifts.
clinicas.useCase2Body: Coordinate nursing teams with partial, full and on-call shifts.
clinicas.useCase3Body: Doctors request direct swaps. Clinical director approves, everything logged for inspection.
clinicas.useCase4Body: Export proof of rest, hours, holidays—everything per labor code.
clinicas.feature1Body: Set different rules for cardiology, emergencies, surgery. Each specialty has its needs.
clinicas.feature2Body: Ensures minimum periods between shifts. Complies with labor law and prevents doctor burnout.
clinicas.feature3Body: Includes on-call shifts with compensation and differentiated rest periods.
clinicas.feature4Body: Automatically records and calculates hours above contract. Essential for compliance.
clinicas.feature5Body: Receive shift notifications, request swaps, view full schedule.
clinicas.feature6Body: Export coverage analysis, absenteeism, shift distribution by specialty.
clinicas.testimonialQuote: Finally I can see all doctors' availability in one place. Shift swaps are no longer a nightmare.
clinicas.faq1Question: Does the system validate rest between night shifts?
clinicas.faq1Answer: Yes. Set the required minimum (e.g., 11 hours between shifts) and the system validates automatically.
clinicas.faq2Question: Can I separate schedules by specialty?
clinicas.faq2Answer: Yes. Each specialty (cardiology, emergencies, etc) can have its own rules and shifts, all visible in one place.
clinicas.faq3Question: How does doctor vacation management work?
clinicas.faq3Answer: Doctors request vacation in the app, manager approves. System prevents coverage gaps and ensures fair distribution.
clinicas.faq4Answer: Yes. Each shift is logged with duration, and the system accumulates overtime per doctor/nurse per month.
clinicas.faq5Question: Does the system generate reports for labor inspection?
clinicas.faq5Answer: Yes. Export rest periods, hours, holidays and any metric needed for labor compliance.
clinicas.finalCtaSubheading: 14 days free. No credit card. Setup for clinic in 30 minutes.

restauracao.eyebrow: For Portuguese restaurants, bars and kitchens
restauracao.heroHeading: Food service schedules handling split shifts, peaks and seasonality
restauracao.heroSubheading: Manage chefs, cooks, servers, receptionists with split shifts (lunch/dinner), weekends, events and seasonal peaks. All automated and fair.
restauracao.painsSubheading: Unique issues in the F&B sector.
restauracao.pain1Body: Lunch 11am-3pm, dinner 7pm-11pm. Some do both, some one only. Managing in Excel is impossible.
restauracao.pain2Body: Summer full, winter empty. Need 15 people in July, 5 in January. How to plan fairly?
restauracao.pain3Body: Weddings, corporate events appear last-minute. Who gets called, who stays out?
restauracao.useCase1Title: Split shifts at lunch and dinner
restauracao.useCase1Body: Create 4h lunch and 5h dinner shifts. System distributes who does one, two or none.
restauracao.useCase2Body: Summer: 15 people. Winter: 5 people. System distributes fairness with variable teams.
restauracao.useCase2Bullet3: Alerts when someone works too much
restauracao.useCase3Body: Wedding, conference—everyone wants to participate. Shiftera controls who gets called and compensation.
restauracao.useCase4Body: See what each shift costs, where peaks are, where you can optimize.
restauracao.feature1Body: Create shifts of any duration (2h, 3.5h, 4h). Lunch, dinner, late night—as you need.
restauracao.feature2Body: Fair distribution even when team varies from 5 to 15 people throughout the year.
restauracao.feature3Body: Create special schedules for weddings, conferences, corporate events. Track compensation.
restauracao.feature4Body: See shift costs, period peaks, per person. Optimize payroll.
restauracao.feature5Body: Servers, cooks see shifts. Request swaps or time off directly in the app.
restauracao.feature6Body: Absenteeism, overtime, shift distribution—all visible for analysis.
restauracao.testimonialQuote: With the turnover we have in food service, Shiftera is essential. I set up shifts in minutes and the team gets everything on their phone.
restauracao.faq1Answer: Yes. Create shifts of any duration (2h, 3.5h, 4h, 5h, etc). Multiple shifts per day possible.
restauracao.faq2Question: Does the system distribute fairness during peak season?
restauracao.faq2Answer: Yes. Even with variable teams (5 in winter, 15 in summer), fairness score accounts for seasonality.
restauracao.faq3Question: How does special event management work?
restauracao.faq3Answer: Create an event-specific schedule (wedding, conference). System logs who participated and overtime.
restauracao.faq4Question: Can I track costs per shift?
restauracao.faq4Answer: Yes. See what each shift costs, which period is most expensive, where to optimize.
restauracao.faq5Question: Does the app work offline in the kitchen?
restauracao.faq5Answer: The app syncs when online. Cooks see shifts even offline.
restauracao.finalCtaHeading: Ready for food service without chaos?
restauracao.finalCtaSubheading: 14 days free. No credit card. Setup in 20 minutes.

hoteis.heroSubheading: Manage reception (24/7), housekeeping, kitchen and dining with complex schedules. Coordinate continuous shifts, occupancy seasonality and department-specific shifts.
hoteis.pain1Body: Reception always open, housekeeping day-only, F&B lunch/dinner service. Each department has own rules.
hoteis.pain2Body: High season (20 rooms) vs low (5 rooms). Housekeeping needs 8 people or 2 depending on occupancy.
hoteis.pain3Body: Reception, housekeeping, kitchen, restaurant, cleaning. All different shifts and rules. Impossible to see in Excel.
hoteis.useCase1Body: Reception always open. System ensures full coverage and fairly distributes night shifts.
hoteis.useCase2Body: Set staffing by occupancy rate. 80% occupancy = 8 people. 30% = 3 people.
hoteis.useCase3Body: Lunch 12pm-3pm, dinner 7pm-11pm. Kitchen coordinates with dining. Some full-shift, some part-time.
hoteis.useCase4Body: See fairness, hours, absenteeism per area. Separate analysis for reception, housekeeping, F&B.
hoteis.feature1Body: Each department (reception, housekeeping, F&B) with own shifts and rules, but everything visible at once.
hoteis.feature2Body: Linked to occupancy rate. More guests = auto activates more staff. Low occupancy = optimize costs.
hoteis.feature3Body: Midnights, nights, rotating nights. Distribute load equitably, protect team sleep.
hoteis.feature4Body: Cost per department, per shift, per period. Optimize staffing in high vs low season.
hoteis.feature5Body: Receptionists, housekeepers, chefs see shifts. Request swaps and time off in the app.
hoteis.feature6Body: Fairness by department, absenteeism, occupancy-based coverage. All auditable.
hoteis.testimonialQuote: Managing schedules for reception, housekeeping and F&B in a hotel is complex. Shiftera simplified everything with a single view.
hoteis.testimonialRole: Operations Director · Hotel Palácio do Mar
hoteis.faq1Question: Does the system work for 24/7 reception?
hoteis.faq1Answer: Yes. Create night shifts, midnights and rotating breaks. System ensures coverage and fair distribution.
hoteis.faq2Question: Can I link staffing to occupancy rate?
hoteis.faq2Answer: Yes. Set: 80% occupancy = 8 housekeeping staff. 30% occupancy = 3 staff. System adapts.
hoteis.faq3Question: Does it work for multiple departments?
hoteis.faq3Answer: Yes. Reception, housekeeping, F&B, cleaning—all different shifts, visible in one dashboard.
hoteis.faq4Question: I have highly variable part-time staff. Does it work?
hoteis.faq4Answer: Yes. Each person has a contract (full-time or part-time). System respects and distributes accordingly.
hoteis.faq5Question: Can I make special schedules for events/banquets?
hoteis.faq5Answer: Yes. Create event schedule (wedding, conference). Log participants and overtime.
hoteis.finalCtaHeading: Ready for hotels without operational chaos?
hoteis.finalCtaSubheading: 14 days free. No credit card. Setup per department in 30 minutes.
